mapper.sql: code, day, name, open, high, low, `close`, prev_close, percent, volume, amount, ma5, ma10, ma20, ma30, dea, dif, macd, cross_params
mapper.select: select * from yeark where code = #{code} and day = #{day}
mapper.delete: delete from yeark where code = #{code} and day = #{day}
mapper.insert: insert into yeark (code, day, name, open, high, low, `close`, prev_close, percent, volume, amount, ma5, ma10, ma20, ma30, dea, dif, macd, cross_params, create_time, update_time) values (#{code}, #{day}, #{name}, #{open}, #{high}, #{low}, #{close}, #{prevClose}, #{percent}, #{volume}, #{amount}, #{ma5}, #{ma10}, #{ma20}, #{ma30}, #{dea}, #{dif}, #{macd}, #{crossParams}, now(), now())
mapper.select:
select max(day) from yeark where code = 'sh600000'
and day < #{fromDay}

select
from yeark s
and s.code in
#{item}
